_readme: Copy to HK_DATA_DIR/reaction-role-panels.json (default data/hk-bot/). Replace placeholders. Hot reload: file watch + mtime (no bot restart). Extra keys like _readme are ignored.
_llm: Optional: set HK_LLM_ENABLED=true plus OpenRouter-compatible env. HK will only try explicit free models returned by vendor/llm_fallbacks; otherwise deterministic replies remain active.

mappings._note: Optional: multiple emojis → same role; roleNameHint matches guild role by name (case-insensitive fallback).
